final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a dark gothic castle interior with towering vaulted ceilings.

Style/medium: dark gothic fantasy illustration, moody atmospheric rendering inspired by classic gothic architecture and horror cinema
Composition: low-angle wide shot looking up at vaulted ceiling, emphasizing vertical scale and imposing architecture
Subject: ornate gothic cathedral interior with soaring ribbed vaults, pointed arches, stone pillars
Scene/backdrop: gothic castle interior, massive stone walls, intricate architectural details
Lighting/mood: blood-red light streaming through stained glass windows, heavy shadows, candlelight from candelabras, mysterious and oppressive atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson red as dominant accent, dark charcoal and black shadows, warm amber candlelight highlights
Materials/textures: weathered stone surfaces, iron chains, aged metal candelabras, colored glass with religious imagery
Avoid: bright cheerful lighting, modern elements, clean pristine surfaces, 8K stuffer words, generic fantasy aesthetic
